# 🎓 Student Management System

A modern and responsive Student Management System built using **HTML, CSS, and JavaScript**. This project helps manage student records, attendance, grades, analytics, and report exports through an interactive dashboard.

---

## 🚀 Features

### 👨‍🎓 Student Management

* Add Students
* Edit Student Details
* Delete Students
* Search Students
* Auto-generated Student IDs

### 📊 Attendance Management

* Mark Students as Present/Absent
* Attendance Percentage Calculation
* Present & Absent Student Statistics

### 🏆 Performance Tracking

* Automatic Grade Calculation
* Highest Marks
* Lowest Marks
* Average Marks
* Grade Distribution Analytics

### 📈 Dashboard Analytics

* Total Students
* Present Students
* Absent Students
* Attendance Percentage
* Highest & Lowest Marks
* Interactive Analytics Chart (Chart.js)

### 📄 Report Export

* Export Student Data as PDF
* Export Student Data as Excel File

### 🌙 Additional Features

* Dark Mode Support
* Responsive Design
* Local Storage Persistence
* Professional Dashboard UI

---

## 🛠️ Technologies Used

* HTML5
* CSS3
* JavaScript (ES6)
* Chart.js
* jsPDF
* SheetJS (XLSX)

---

## 📁 Project Structure

```bash
Student-Management-System/
│
├── index.html
├── dashboard.html
├── login.html
│
├── css/
│   └── style.css
│
├── js/
│   ├── auth.js
│   ├── students.js
│   ├── attendance.js
│   ├── marks.js
│   ├── charts.js
│   └── export.js
│
└── README.md
```

## 💾 Data Storage

This project uses **Local Storage** to store student information. Data remains available even after refreshing the browser.
